meta.title: ATM Trainer — Free Cash Machine Simulator
meta.description: Free ATM simulator to practice withdrawing cash. An educational tool for cognitive disabilities and special education — for care professionals and families.
meta.keywords: ATM simulator, ATM trainer, cash machine simulator, cognitive disability, learning disability, special education, accessibility tool, educational software, withdrawing cash, autonomy training
meta.ogTitle: ATM Trainer — Free Cash Machine Simulator
meta.ogDescription: Free and open-source ATM simulator to help people with cognitive disabilities learn to withdraw cash independently.
meta.twitterDescription: Free and open-source ATM simulator to help people with cognitive disabilities learn to withdraw cash independently.
meta.schemaApp: An ATM (cash machine) simulator designed to help people with cognitive disabilities practice withdrawing cash on their own.
meta.audience: People with cognitive disabilities, special education and care professionals, support workers
featureList: Complete simulation of a cash withdrawal at an ATM
Inserting the card, entering the PIN, collecting the bills and the receipt
Progress tracking with a customisable streak goal
Works on tablet and browser, no installation required
